name: Cathedral
description: '''Cathedral''' were a British [[doom metal]] band from [[Coventry]], England. The group gained attention upon release of its debut album, ''[[Forest of Equilibrium]]'' (1991), which is considered a classic of the genre. However, the band's sound evolved quickly and began to adopt characteristics of 1970s metal, [[hard rock]] and [[progressive rock]]. After releasing ten full-length albums and touring extensively for over two decades, Cathedral broke up after the release of ''[[The Last Spire]]'' in 2013.
